review_title: Highly recommended All in one HR platform
description: Overall the app is very useful and easy to use.
author: Rodolfo G.
pros: you can see all the leaves of employees, apply leave on the app even at home, track who is on leave, see your payslip, monitor your attendance and time in/out.
cons: One thing I notice is the Time In/Out discrepancy, I have experience late only of 5 minutes but I extend my out of more then 20 mins but in the system Im still not complete of day working hours and still have late.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: So far so good. It is easy to use. And the instructor explained everything very clearly.
author: Daphne S.
pros: It is very easy to use and clear instructions provided.
cons: NIL. So far i have no issue with Info-Tech HRMS
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One of the Best All-in-1 Software
author: Yuvaraj M.
pros: I have seen some companies have their own HRMS software but I feel when there is software like this, no need to spend time on creating HRMS rather can create different products for the best of the company.This software is easy to use with all the features and the company can go for options with the features they only need it.
cons: Some additional capabilities like sorting the table with the date can be done. Because to find a claim that is pending, I have to search it by clicking one by one. Or can just show one more column as status in the table
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: My experience with InfoTech has been positive and efficient. The platform is user-friendly and easy to navigate, making it simple to access and retrieve data quickly. It has greatly improved our ability to monitor employee activities, manage records, and stay organized. The system’s features allow for streamlined operations, which helps save time and reduce manual work. Overall, InfoTech provides a convenient and reliable solution for day-to-day HR and administrative tasks.

description: Good😊 Infotech offers a robust and user-friendly suite of tools designed to streamline project management and enterprise workflows. Its intuitive interface and customizable features make it suitable for businesses of all sizes. The software excels in data integration, reporting, and real-time collaboration. While initial setup can be a bit complex, Infotech’s responsive customer support and comprehensive training resources help smooth the learning curve. Overall, it’s a reliable solution for organizations looking to enhance efficiency and decision-making.
author: Anrich A.
pros: I like the Payroll system, is easy to use and implement across the team. Making our payroll process much easier!
cons: Maybe can implement more features for employee engagement such as employee survey, feedbacks, and etc
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: My overall experience with Info-Tech HRMS has been positive. The platform offers a comprehensive suite of HR solutions that effectively streamlines core functions such as payroll, attendance tracking, leave management, and employee records. Its cloud-based accessibility and mobile capabilities have significantly improved operational efficiency and convenience for both HR and employees.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The dashboard is intuitive and easy to navigate, making daily HR tasks like leave approvals, claims, and attendance tracking seamless for both HR and employees.
cons: Some modules have fixed workflows or field limitations, making it difficult to tailor certain processes to our company’s unique HR policies.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Info-Tech HRMS provides useful features for payroll, attendance, and leave management, which has streamlined many HR processes. However, some functions could be more intuitive, and certain customizations require additional support from their service team. Overall, it has been effective but with room for improvement in usability and flexibility.
author: Michelle L.
pros: Customer support is very quick in responding. Efficient system for HR solutions. Customisable system to policy
cons: Because it is customisable, if the set up is not set up correctly - it affects the usage of the system.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Debbie T.
pros: experience with Info-Tech System has been excellent. The platform is very user-friendly and makes HR tasks like payroll, leave applications, and attendance tracking so much easier. Their support team is responsive and always willing to guide us whenever we need help. Overall, it has really improved our efficiency and saved us a lot of time. Highly recommended!
cons: Some advanced features took a little time to get used to, but once we got familiar with them, everything ran smoothly. Customization options could be a bit more flexible, but the system still covers all the essential HR needs very well. Occasionally, the system depends on having a stable internet connection, but otherwise it works great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Convenient to use and check on information. Accessible anywhere as long as you can access to internet or mobile network.
author: Chee Yong T.
pros: Easy to use and understand. Many features available. Customizable user rights access. Every you need incorporated into one application.
cons: Not that I can think of. May be the cost of the HRMS can be lower or not restricted by the number of users.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Verified Reviewer
